definition: Courage; the quality of being brave in the face of difficulty or danger.
Beautiful; attractive in appearance. Often used to describe people
column8: Royal Institute Dictionary of Thailand (Updated Edition)

definition: To cherish; to hold something dear with deep affection.
etymology: Burmese compound: မြတ် (precious) + နိုး (to value)

definition: Love; a deep feeling of affection and attachment toward someone or something.
etymology: Thai compound: ความ (abstract noun prefix) + รัก (to love)

definition: Kind-hearted; generous and gentle in nature.
etymology: Thai compound: ใจ (heart) + ดี (good)

definition: A dream; an aspiration or vision one hopes to achieve.
etymology: Thai compound: ความ (abstract noun prefix) + ฝัน (to dream)

definition: Serene; perfectly still and at peace.
